---
id: trigger-reindex
title: "Trigger reindex"
description: "Create tasks to reindex sources. If no source IDs are provided, all enabled sources are reindexed."
sidebar_label: "Trigger reindex"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Trigger reindex"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/admin/reindex"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create tasks to reindex sources. If no source IDs are provided, all enabled sources are reindexed.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"priority":{"description":"Priority sets the task priority (-100 to 100)","type":"integer"},"source_ids":{"description":"SourceIDs optionally specifies which sources to reindex\nIf empty, all enabled sources are reindexed","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}}},"description":"Reindex options","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"202":{"description":"Accepted","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Response containing task IDs created for reindex operation","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"},"task_ids":{"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Invalid request body","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
